products.shortDescription: Relaxed, slightly oversized heavyweight hoodie with subtle 2F branding.
products.sizeGuideInfo: Relaxed oversized fit. Select your regular size for the intended fit or size down for a closer fit.
products.name: 2Fitty Core Heavyweight Hoodie
products.materials: [420 GSM cotton fleece blend], [80% cotton, 20% polyester]
products.fit: Relaxed, slightly oversized fit with dropped shoulders.
products.careInstructions: [Machine wash cold, inside out]. [Tumble dry low]. [Do not iron on print/embroidery].
products.description: The 2Fitty Core Heavyweight Hoodie is cut in a relaxed, slightly oversized fit with dropped shoulders and a structured hood. Finished with subtle embroidered 2F branding on the chest, a kangaroo pocket, and ribbed cuffs and hem for a clean, everyday shape.

products.shortDescription: Relaxed-taper fleece sweatpants that pair with the Core Heavyweight Hoodie.
products.sizeGuideInfo: Relaxed, tapered fit. Select your regular size for the intended fit or size down for a closer fit.
products.name: 2Fitty Core Relaxed Sweatpants
products.materials: [420 GSM cotton fleece blend], [80% cotton, 20% polyester]
products.fit: Relaxed through the thigh, tapered at the ankle.
products.careInstructions: [Machine wash cold, inside out]. [Tumble dry low].
products.description: The 2Fitty Core Relaxed Sweatpants feature a relaxed-through-the-thigh, tapered-at-the-ankle silhouette in soft brushed fleece. An elastic drawstring waistband and ribbed ankle cuffs keep the fit clean, with a small embroidered 2F mark at the hip. Designed to be worn alone or matched with the Core Heavyweight Hoodie as a set.
